source_description: Turn nutrition_intake and supplement_intake from storage-only into first-class, build-and-use-able dimensions: teach the parser-generator skill the intake path, ship resolvers + one descriptive signal per domain through the existing input-resolution seam, anchor with a synthetic reference parser/fixture, document the generalized add-a-dimension rule, and close with a recommendation on whether/when a dedicated intake-dimension contract earns its place.
